name: Ensure Global Corp., Ltd.
summary: Ensure Global Corp., Ltd. manufactures and sells spun-like fabrics and yarns in Taiwan. The company offers air and draw textured yarns; knitted fabrics; and mirror surface wiping clothes. It also provides cotton-like fabric and microfiber products. In addition, the company offers grating, twill, and interweaving products. Further, it provides wind breakers, shirts, knitting sports wears, casual pants, and durable towels. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.
